list.name: sport
list.rawQuery: SELECT DISTINCT m.sport_code AS __text, m.sport_code AS __value FROM bets b JOIN matches m ON m.id = b.match_id

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(b.pnl_units) / NULLIF(SUM(b.stake_units), 0) AS roi FROM bets b JOIN matches m ON m.id = b.match_id WHERE b.status IN ('won','lost','halfwon','halflost') AND b.settled_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND ($sport = 'all' OR m.sport_code IN ($sport))
SELECT AVG(clv) AS clv_avg FROM bets WHERE clv IS NOT NULL AND settled_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

SELECT CASE WHEN p.ev < 0.04 THEN '3-4%' WHEN p.ev < 0.05 THEN '4-5%' WHEN p.ev < 0.07 THEN '5-7%' WHEN p.ev < 0.10 THEN '7-10%' ELSE '10%+' END AS ev_bucket, COUNT(*) AS bets, AVG(CASE WHEN b.status = 'won' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS hit_rate, SUM(b.pnl_units) AS pnl_total FROM bets b JOIN predictions p ON p.id = b.prediction_id WHERE b.status IN ('won','lost') AND b.settled_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, bankroll_units FROM bankroll_history WHERE is_paper = true AND ts > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY ts
SELECT skip_reason AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM predictions WHERE decision = 'skip' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1

panels.title: ROI por región MX vs US

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN b.bookmaker IN ('caliente','strendus','codere_mx','betway_mx','betano_mx','betsson_mx','bwin_mx','novibet_mx') THEN 'MX' WHEN b.bookmaker IN ('draftkings','fanduel','betmgm','caesars','fanatics','betrivers','espn_bet','hardrock','circa') THEN 'US' ELSE 'other' END AS region, SUM(b.pnl_units) / NULLIF(SUM(b.stake_units),0) AS roi FROM bets b WHERE b.status IN ('won','lost') AND b.settled_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1
